channel.title: Firmware Development on OS
channel.description: Last 10 notes on Firmware Development on OS

item.title: SESSION 1: MICROBLAZE PLATFORM FOR PETALINUX
item.description: SESSION 1: MICROBLAZE PLATFORM FOR PETALINUX In this first session we are learning on how to generate from zero (to hero) a Petalinux system using the AMD Software for FPGA development.

item.title: SESSION 2: SOFTWARE COMPONENTS OF PETALINUX
item.description: SESSION 2: SOFTWARE COMPONENTS OF PETALINUX In this session we are learning on how to take advantage of the system we have built with our own hands in the previous session.

item.title: EXTRA: Coding applications in Vitis Unified
item.description: Coding applications in Vitis Unified AMD provides an Integrated Development Environment (IDE) for their FPGA solutions, where all the tools needed for building and debugging software are included.

item.title: Home
item.description: Welcome to the laboratory sessions of embedded Linux in Firmware Development on OS This is the main index for the lab sessions that will be done in the next two days.
